title: dysoxylum cyrtobotryum var. borneense
intro: Dysoxylum cyrtobotryum var. borneense is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae and is native to Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysoxylum cyrtobotryum var. borneense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
